summary: Iteration 18: UI Adjustment Testing - Wallet Screen Layout & Share Message. Fixed critical prop mismatch bug in ShareInviteModal. All 7 features verified.
passed_tests: Wallet screen shows 'INDIQUE E GANHE' section BEFORE 'ATIVOS' section
Wallet screen order: Hero banner → INDIQUE E GANHE (code + buttons) → ATIVOS/Meus Tokens
Indicar Amigo and Indicar Loja buttons visible side by side below referral code box
ShareInviteModal for friend type generates message starting with 'Olá! Olha que aplicativo fantástico'
ShareInviteModal message contains dynamic referral code in URL (?ref=ITOKE18555A)
ShareInviteModal for friend does NOT include recipient name in the message
Indicar Loja modal shows establishment message correctly

verified_features.feature: Section order: Hero → INDIQUE E GANHE → ATIVOS
verified_features.verification: Playwright test confirmed positions: hero_pos < indique_pos < ativos_pos

verified_features.feature: Share buttons side by side below referral code
verified_features.verification: Code review: wallet.tsx lines 138-157 show shareRow with flex layout

verified_features.feature: Friend share message starts with 'Olá! Olha que aplicativo fantástico'
verified_features.verification: Playwright test confirmed message in modal preview

verified_features.feature: Dynamic referral code in share URL
Friend message does NOT include recipient name
verified_features.verification: Code review: ShareInviteModal.tsx line 62 - message starts with 'Olá!' without name variable

bugs_fixed.issue: Prop mismatch: ShareInviteModal expected 'type' prop but received 'isFriend'
bugs_fixed.impact: Modal was always showing establishment type instead of friend type

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed critical prop mismatch bug that caused friend modal to always show establishment content
wallet.tsx section order is correct: HeroCard → INDIQUE E GANHE → ATIVOS → GANHOS POR INDICAÇÃO → MINHA REDE → HISTÓRICO
ShareInviteModal getMessage() correctly returns different messages for friend vs establishment
data-testid attributes present on share buttons for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 complete. Fixed prop mismatch bug in wallet.tsx where ShareInviteModal was receiving 'isFriend' prop instead of 'type' prop. All wallet UI adjustments verified: (1) INDIQUE E GANHE section appears before ATIVOS; (2) Share buttons side by side below referral code; (3) Friend message starts with 'Olá! Olha que aplicativo fantástico'; (4) Dynamic referral code in URL; (5) Friend message does not include recipient name. Client referral code is ITOKE18555A.
